warning_signs: Low volume on breakout
Immediate return below resistance level
false_breakout.rejection_logic: Lack of true institutional buying, indicative of retail-driven price action

warning_signs: Reversal after penetration of neckline
Violating a previously valid trendline
failed_head_and_shoulders.rejection_logic: Indicates a market reversal or failure of the anticipated trend, resulting in a sharp move in the opposite direction

warning_signs: Low volume on breakout
Retracement of 50% or more of the rally from the second low to the breakout point
failed_double_bottom.rejection_logic: Lack of buying pressure and momentum to sustain upward movement, indicating vulnerability to reversal

warning_signs: Volume fails to expand on breakout
Price struggles to move beyond previous highs/lows
shrinking_volume_breakout_in_a_triangle.rejection_logic: Lack of commitment from big money players on the breakout, increasing risk of false signal

warning_signs: Lack of volume expansion on breakout
Formation morphs into another pattern (e.g., head-and-shoulders)
failed_symmetrical_triangle.rejection_logic: The absence of volume suggests no institutional support for the breakout.

warning_signs: Weak volume on breakout
False break past horizontal line followed by vigorous move in opposite direction
failed_right-angled_triangle.rejection_logic: Reflects false continuation signal, often reversed by large position unwinding.

warning_signs: Gap occurs after a long price advance
Volume very high but price fails to advance further
exhaustion_gap.rejection_logic: Gap is caused by retail traders, while institutions are likely selling into strength

warning_signs: Gap up followed by a gap down creating an isolated price range
Accompanied by high volume
island_reversal.rejection_logic: Island reversals reflect an abrupt change in sentiment, usually resolving in the opposite direction.

warning_signs: Price temporarily breaks a significant level but closes back below/above it
Long wick above/below
pinocchio_bar.rejection_logic: Signals a false breakout, typically a sucker move to trap uninformed traders into taking the wrong position.

warning_signs: Breakout against the primary trend
RSI near oversold/overbought
contra-trend_breakout.rejection_logic: High likelihood of being a whipsaw due to dominant primary trend resuming

warning_signs: Price breaks resistance but oscillator shows negative divergence
Lack of volume expansion
divergence_and_breakout.rejection_logic: Potential momentum loss implied by divergence, indicating false breakout

warning_signs: Breakout with no surge in volume
Overextended price from 200-day SMA
bull_trap.rejection_logic: Unsustainable breakout subject to quick reversal, institutions not supporting the move

warning_signs: Heavy price rejection at previous support levels now resistance
Weakening RSI below 50
overhead_supply_resistance.rejection_logic: Institutional sellers stymie upward momentum, high risk of reversion

warning_signs: Exponential price move followed by high volume sell-off
Relative Strength drops sharply
climactic_top.rejection_logic: Distribution phase not recognized promptly, indicating a shift to bearish control

warning_signs: Initial breakout followed by bearish engulfing candle
RSI divergence
head-fake.rejection_logic: Institutional selling or short positions drive the immediate pullback

warning_signs: Price closes below breakout level next day
Volume decreases
failed_breakout.rejection_logic: Institutions may lack confidence, leading to a quick reversal and potential for deep pullbacks.

warning_signs: Rapid price retreat post initial breakout
Lack of follow-through volume
false_start.rejection_logic: Indicates lack of institutional support; breakout lacks underlying demand.

warning_signs: Price breaks below support but quickly rebounds
Significant volume spike
bear_trap.rejection_logic: Traders are tricked into selling at a perceived breakdown, but institutions accumulate shares at discounted prices.

rectangle_pattern.logic: Volume confirmation needed on breakout, monitor trendlines
rectangle_pattern.institutional_footprint: Institutions accumulate positions within the range before breakout

symmetrical_triangle.logic: Breakout occurs between one-half and two-thirds of the pattern, volume expands on breakout
symmetrical_triangle.institutional_footprint: Institutions are moving to resolve the battle between buyers and sellers, usually indicated by volume expansion upon breakout

double_bottom.logic: Heavy volume on the first bottom, lower volume on the second, expanding volume on breakout
double_bottom.institutional_footprint: Smart money accumulates at lower prices, evident in volume pattern

reverse_head_and_shoulders.logic: Heavy volume on left shoulder and/or head, low volume on right-shoulder decline, high volume accompanies upside breakout
reverse_head_and_shoulders.institutional_footprint: Accumulation phase where informed investors are accumulating in anticipation of rising prices

symmetrical_triangles.logic: Volume shrinking as pattern forms, expanding on breakout
symmetrical_triangles.institutional_footprint: Heavy accumulation or distribution leading to decisive breakout

right-angled_triangles.institutional_footprint: Follow-through confirming with buying or selling pressure

breakaway_gap.logic: High volume corroborating the gap, failure to close the gap on a retest, price makes a new high confirming the trend direction.
breakaway_gap.institutional_footprint: Institutional buying typically follows a breakaway gap, indicating strong interest and conviction.

two-bar_reversal.logic: Two wide bars with above-average volume, preceded by a strong trend
two-bar_reversal.institutional_footprint: Indicates strong change in sentiment from institutions, signifying a likely reversal

institutional_breakout.logic: Price breaks above key resistance with 10-day SMA rising and volume at least 50% above 20-day average
institutional_breakout.institutional_footprint: Big money is accumulating shares, pushing price through resistance with conviction

transition_breakout.logic: Price above 50 SMA, Volume increase compared to prior days, Relative Strength above a threshold of 70
transition_breakout.institutional_footprint: Accumulation evident with increased institutional bid

retest_bounce.logic: Price retests and holds above previous resistance now turned support, 20 SMA turns upward, Volume supports breakout
retest_bounce.institutional_footprint: Big players using pullbacks to add to positions

trend_alignment_entry.logic: Price and 50 SMA both above 200 SMA, Volume sustains above moving average volume
trend_alignment_entry.institutional_footprint: Alignment of trend and volume indicates strong institutional trend-following

ascending_triangle_breakout.logic: Price closes above the horizontal resistance line with 30-day average volume at least 20% higher than the previous day
ascending_triangle_breakout.institutional_footprint: Significant volume on breakout day indicates that institutions are accumulating

cup_and_handle.logic: Price breaking above the rim of the cup, 50-day SMA rising, and volume increasing on breakout
cup_and_handle.institutional_footprint: Large buying volume as institutions initiate positions

ascending_triangle.logic: Horizontal resistance and ascending trendline, 50-day SMA support, volume contraction followed by a surge
ascending_triangle.institutional_footprint: Institutional interest builds as the price consistently tests resistance

breakout_from_range.logic: Price moves beyond a well-defined resistance level with volume 150% above average, 10-day SMA crosses above 50-day SMA
breakout_from_range.institutional_footprint: Significant institutional buying seen in increased volume and SMA cross

high_volume_breakout.logic: Stock price moves above significant resistance with volume at least 50% greater than the average volume over the past 20 days.
high_volume_breakout.institutional_footprint: Large volume spike suggests institutions are accumulating shares aggressively.

consolidation_breakout.logic: Price breaks above a defined range after a period of low volatility with a 10-day SMA turned upward.
consolidation_breakout.institutional_footprint: Institutions create price congestion to accumulate quietly.

sma_crossover.logic: Short-term SMA (e.g., 10-day) crosses above long-term SMA (e.g., 50-day) with increasing volume.
sma_crossover.institutional_footprint: Institutions use crossover points as signals to increase positioning in anticipation of sustained moves.

stage_1_-_accumulation.math: Prices move sideways, volume starts to increase within the range, 200 SMA flattens
stage_1_-_accumulation.action: Hold or cautiously buy as accumulation hints at a potential upward breakout

stage_2_-_markup.math: Price consistently above rising 50 and 200 SMA, increasing volume
stage_2_-_markup.action: Buy on dips as the uptrend is confirmed

stage_3_-_distribution.math: Price moves sideways with volatility, volume is choppy, SMA convergence
stage_3_-_distribution.action: Prepare to sell as institutions distribute shares

stage_4_-_markdown.math: Price below declining 50 and 200 SMA, increasing volume in selloffs
stage_4_-_markdown.action: Avoid buying, consider short positions or sell existing holdings

stage_1/accumulation.math: Price below 200 SMA, flat or turning up, volume lethargic
stage_1/accumulation.action: Hold or Buy on initial breakout above trading range

stage_2/markup.math: Price above rising 200 SMA, volume expanding on up moves
stage_2/markup.action: Buy and Hold until exhaustion signals or major resistance levels

stage_3/distribution.math: Price flattens, moving averages converge, volume starts picking up during declines
stage_3/distribution.action: Sell or Hold if already declining on breakdown from trading range

stage_4/markdown.math: Price below declining 200 SMA, volume expands on down moves
stage_4/markdown.action: Sell short or avoid, especially on breakdowns from consolidation patterns

stage_1_(accumulation).math: SMA Flat, Volume decreasing, Occasional volume spikes
stage_1_(accumulation).action: Hold - Accumulate on dips with signs of institutional buying.

stage_2_(markup).math: SMA Upward Sloping, Volume above average on up days
stage_2_(markup).action: Buy aggressively during breakouts or retracements.

stage_3_(distribution).math: SMA Flat or Rolling Over, Volume increases indicating selling pressure
stage_3_(distribution).action: Sell - Reduce positions as selling pressure mounts.

stage_4_(markdown).math: SMA Downward Sloping, Volume excessive on down days
stage_4_(markdown).action: Avoid - Do not buy; wait for signs of accumulation.

stage_1_accumulation.math: Price gravitates above 200 SMA with rising volume

stage_2_markup.math: Price consistently above 200 SMA with increasing volume

stage_3_distribution.math: Price fluctuates around 200 SMA with high volume variance

stage_4_markdown.math: Price consistently below 200 SMA with decreasing volume

stage_1.math: Flattening or slightly rising 200-day SMA, declining volume as the base forms
stage_1.action: Hold or Wait - accumulation phase, wait for confirmation of breakout

stage_2.math: Rising 50-day and 200-day SMA, increasing volume on upward moves
stage_2.action: Buy - markup phase, characterized by strong institutional accumulation

stage_3.math: Flattening or declining 50-day SMA, volume surges on declines
stage_3.action: Sell - distribution phase, institutions distribute shares before decline

stage_4.math: Declining 50-day and 200-day SMA, high volume on down days
stage_4.action: Avoid - markdown phase, characterized by institutional selling
